Package Workout

Class Running

  • java.lang.Object
    • Workout.BasicWorkout
      • Workout.Running
  • public class Running
extends BasicWorkout

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private int distance
      distance of this running workout in m.

      • Fields declared in class Workout.BasicWorkout

        date, description, duration, energy, intensity

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      Running​(Date date, int duration, int distance, java.lang.String description)
      creates a run on specified date with a specified duration, distance and description.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getEnergy()
      estimates the energy burned during this run.
      the energy is estimated as the intensity * 100 * duration in hours.
      int getIntensity()
      getter method for the intensity of this run.
      The intensity is based on the pace (min/km) according to the table:
      java.lang.String toString()
      returns a String representation of this run.
      Appends the distance to the string representation of a BasicWorkout

      • Methods declared in class Workout.BasicWorkout

        getDescription, getIntensityString

      • Methods declared in class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • distance

        private int distance
        distance of this running workout in m.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Running

        public Running​(Date date,
               int duration,
               int distance,
               java.lang.String description)
        creates a run on specified date with a specified duration, distance and description.
        Parameters:
        date - the date of this run
        duration - the duration of this run in s
        distance - the distance of this run in m
        description - the description of this run

    • Method Detail

      • getIntensity

        public int getIntensity()
        getter method for the intensity of this run.
        The intensity is based on the pace (min/km) according to the table:

        intensity levels based on pace
        pace [min/km] intensity
        <3 10
        <4 9
        <5 8
        <6 7
        <7 6
        <8 5
        <9 4
        <10 3
        <11 2
        other 1

        Overrides:
        getIntensity in class BasicWorkout
        Returns:
        the intensity.

      • getEnergy

        public int getEnergy()
        estimates the energy burned during this run.
        the energy is estimated as the intensity * 100 * duration in hours.
        Overrides:
        getEnergy in class BasicWorkout
        Returns:
        the energy in kcal of this workout

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        returns a String representation of this run.
        Appends the distance to the string representation of a BasicWorkout
        Overrides:
        toString in class BasicWorkout
